name: Oracle REST Data Services API
description: Oracle REST Data Services (ORDS) provides a REST interface for Oracle Database. It enables HTTPS access to database resources including tables, views, PL/SQL procedures, and custom REST modules. ORDS supports AutoREST for automatic RESTful access to database objects, custom resource modules with SQL/PLSQL handlers, OpenAPI catalog generation, OAuth2 authentication, and database management operations.
